Home/Services

Services

Professional technology services for connectivity, security, and business operations.

Opticable brings together infrastructure, wireless, IT systems, surveillance, and secure-entry services in one clearer technology offering for business clients.

Request a quoteAbout

Technology infrastructure partner

Opticable helps businesses design, install, and support the technology infrastructure that keeps their operations connected, secure, and efficient.

Structured CablingProfessional WiFiIT SolutionsCamera SurveillanceAccess ControlIntercom SystemsFiber Optic InstallationIP Phone Systems

Services

Core services

The first services clients typically need when modernizing connectivity, security, and day-to-day operations.

Network foundation

Structured Cabling

LAN

Structured cabling, patch panels, certification, and rack organization for reliable business connectivity.

View service page

Wireless performance

Professional WiFi

WIFI

Coverage planning, access point installation, wireless optimization, and secure business WiFi support.

View service page

Managed systems

IT Solutions

IT

Servers, workstations, network equipment, operational support, and practical IT infrastructure services.

View service page

Site security

Camera Surveillance

CCTV

Camera installation, storage planning, remote viewing, and security-system integration for business environments.

View service page

Secure entry

Access Control

ENTRY

Secure entry systems, readers, door hardware, and integrated access workflows for business properties.

View service page

Services

Complementary services

Additional systems and supporting layers that complete a more resilient technology environment.

Visitor communication

Intercom Systems

COMMS

Audio-video intercom systems for visitor communication, tenant workflows, and integrated secure entry.

View service page

Backbone capacity

Fiber Optic Installation

FIBER

Fiber backbones, risers, handoff extensions, and high-capacity links for commercial properties.

View service page

Business voice

IP Phone Systems

VOIP

Business phone infrastructure, handset connectivity, VoIP-ready cabling, and network support for office communication.

View service page

Project process

Project process

A strong technology project starts with the right planning, then moves through clean delivery and practical follow-up.

01

Assessment

We review the site, the current environment, operational constraints, and the systems that need to work together.

02

Design

We define the technical scope, infrastructure approach, device locations, and the right deployment path.

03

Installation

We install, configure, organize, and test the infrastructure with a clean and professional workflow.

04

Support

We help with turnover, optimization, and the next operational steps after implementation.

Services

Project capabilities

Common implementation work that often supports a broader technology mandate.

Patch panels and rack organization

Patching, labeling, cable management, and cleaner telecom rooms that stay easier to support.

Wireless optimization

Post-install tuning, segmentation, and adjustments that improve reliability and user experience.

Infrastructure testing

Verification, validation, and documentation that support better turnover and future maintenance.

After-install support

Follow-up support for changes, additions, troubleshooting, and day-to-day operational needs.

Project Intake

Need a technology specialist for cameras, secure entry, WiFi, or building communications?

Send a quote request with the property type, required systems, and target timeline.

Request a quoteView all services

Opticable serves businesses and managed properties across Quebec, including Montreal, Laval, Longueuil, the South Shore, the North Shore, and the Laurentians.
